case_title: FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA vs. KIM, JOO HOON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA FILLMORE CENTER APARTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, JOO HOON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1755 O'FARRELL STREET,APT. #809, LEASE FORFEITED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA FILLMORE CENTER APARTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JOO HOON DOES 1 THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION RE: LOST LOST RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA FILLMORE CENTER APARTMENTS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $26.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA FILLMORE CENTER APARTMENTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JOO HOON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA FILLMORE CENTER APARTMENTS SERVED APR-27-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JOO HOON
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JOO HOON
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA FILLMORE CENTER APARTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JOO HOON
